title: Thirumuruganatheeswar Temple
tagline: Thirumuruganatheeswar Temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Thirumuruganatheeswarar Temple (also called Thirumuruganpoondi temple) in Thirumuruganpoondi, a panchayat town in Tiruppur district in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu, is dedi
overview.description: Thirumuruganatheeswarar Temple (also called Thirumuruganpoondi temple) in Thirumuruganpoondi, a panchayat town in Tiruppur district in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu, is dedicated to the Hindu god Shiva. Constructed in the Dravidian style of architecture, the present structure of the temple is believed to have been built during the Kongu Cholas period in the 10th century. Shiva is worshipped as Thirumuruganatheeswarar and his consort Parvathi as Avudainayagi. The presiding deity is revered in the 7th century Tamil Saiva canonical work, the Tevaram, written by Tamil saint poets known as t

topPlaces.name: Thirumuruganpoondi
topPlaces.description: Thirumuruganpoondi is a Municipality in Tirupur District in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is about 7 kilometres (4 mi) South from Tirupur city and 38 kilometres (24 mi) west from Coimbatore city.

topPlaces.name: Velampalayam
topPlaces.description: Velampalayam was a third grade municipality in Tiruppur district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. As of 2011, the town had a population of 87,427.

topPlaces.name: Anupparpalayam Pudur
topPlaces.description: Anupparpalayam Pudur is a small town located within Tirupur Corporation limits. Also called the "metal town of the Kongu region".

topPlaces.name: Avinashi
topPlaces.description: Avinashi () (previously known as Thirupukkoliyur) is a municipality in the Tiruppur district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Avinashi is one among the nine taluks of the district.

topPlaces.name: Avinasilingeshwarar Temple (Tiruppukkozhiyur)
topPlaces.description: Tiruppukkozhiyur (also called Karunaiyaaththaal Temple, Avinasilingeswarar temple and Avainasiappar temple) is a Hindu temple dedicated to the deity Shiva, located in Avinasi, a panchayat town in Tiruppur district in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Shiva is worshipped as Avinasiappar, and is represented by the lingam.

topPlaces.name: Avinashi taluk
topPlaces.description: Avinashi taluk is a taluk of Tirupur district of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The headquarters of the taluk is the town of Avinashi.

topPlaces.name: Avanashi block
topPlaces.description: Avanashi block is a revenue block in the Tiruppur district of Tamil Nadu, India. It has a total of 31 panchayat villages.

topPlaces.name: Thottipalayam
topPlaces.description: Thottipalayam is a census town and neighbourhood in Tiruppur in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Located in the western part of the state, it is part of the Tiruppur North taluk in Tiruppur district.

Tiruppukkozhiyur (also called Karunaiyaaththaal Temple, Avinasilingeswarar temple and Avainasiappar temple) is a Hindu temple dedicated to the deity Shiva, located in Avinasi, a panchayat town in Tiruppur district in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Shiva is worshipped as Avinasiappar, and is represented by the lingam.
Avinashi taluk is a taluk of Tirupur district of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The headquarters of the taluk is the town of Avinashi.
Avanashi block is a revenue block in the Tiruppur district of Tamil Nadu, India. It has a total of 31 panchayat villages.
Thottipalayam is a census town and neighbourhood in Tiruppur in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Located in the western part of the state, it is part of the Tiruppur North taluk in Tiruppur district.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Thirumuruganatheeswar Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Thirumuruganatheeswar Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Thirumuruganatheeswar Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Coimbatore International Airport (33 km) and the nearest railway station is Coimbatore Junction (42 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Thirumuruganatheeswar Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Thirumuruganatheeswar Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Thirumuruganatheeswar Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Thirumuruganatheeswar Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Thirumuruganatheeswar Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Thirumuruganpoondi, Velampalayam, Anupparpalayam Pudur, Avinashi, Avinasilingeshwarar Temple (Tiruppukkozhiyur).
